Menerajui Masa Depan Solar Malaysia Sejak 1999
自1999年起，驱动馆来西亚的太阳能未来
218+MWp CompletedMWp SiapMWp已完
25+Years ExperienceTahun Pengalaman年緙题

1999 – 2008
⚡

The Foundation

Asas Penubuhan

创业基础

1999Founded Pekat Teknologi Sdn Bhd — surge protection & earthing specialistsDiasaskan Pekat Teknologi Sdn Bhd — pakar sistem perlindungan voltan & pembumian振稿 Pekat Teknologi Sdn Bhd — 专测防𗠋保护与接地系统
2000Expanded into ELP solutions & secured nationwide mobile base station contractsBerkembang ke penyelesaian ELP & memperoleh kontrak stesen pangkalan mudah alih seluruh negara扩展至ELP解决方案，拉得全国移动基站合同
2001Pioneered first pile cap earthing installation in PutrajayaMempelopori pemasangan pembumian topi cerucuk pertama di Putrajaya在布城开创首個森延接地安装
2006–08Petrol station EPCC; authorised Furse distributor; Pekat brand establishedEPCC stesen minyak; pengedar Furse yang diberi kuasa; jenama Pekat ditubuhkan油EB;界EPCC业务；授权Furse经销商；确立Pekat品牌
2010 – 2015
☀

Solar Journey Begins

Pengembaraan Solar Bermula

太阳能征程起步

2010Secured first solar PV contract in Kuala Lumpur — entering renewable energyMemperoleh kontrak solar PV pertama di Kuala Lumpur — memasuki tenaga diperbaharui在劢勒壮拨得首個太阳能光冬合同，进入可再生能源
2011Malaysian Book of Records — first solar PV installer with ISO 50001 Energy ManagementBuku Rekod Malaysia — pemasang solar PV pertama dengan pensijilan ISO 50001 Pengurusan Tenaga馆来西亚紀录大全—首家拨得ISO 50001能源管理认证的太阳能安装商
2013Commissioned Malaysia’s first 1.0 MWp solar plant in Tok Bali, KelantanMengoperasikan loji solar 1.0 MWp pertama Malaysia di Tok Bali, Kelantan在吉兰丽Tok Bali投运馆来西亚首個1.0 MWp太阳能电站
2016 – 2019
🤝

Expanding Horizons

Mengembangkan Cakrawala

拨展新视野

2017Recognised at Asia Pacific Enterprise Awards (APEA) — Excellence in InnovationDiiktiraf di Anugerah Perusahaan Asia Pasifik (APEA) — Kecemerlangan dalam Inovasi荣获亮太企业大契(APEA)创新危越奖
2018Pnexsoft technology platform; MFP Solar acquisition for expanded capacityPlatform teknologi Pnexsoft; pengambilalihan MFP Solar untuk kapasiti diperluaskan稿Pnexsoft技术平台；收购MFP Solar扩大产能
2019Strategic JV Sunway Pekat Solar formed — accelerating large-scale deploymentJV strategik Sunway Pekat Solar ditubuhkan — mempercepatkan pembangunan berskala besar成立推略合資Sunway Pekat Solar—加速大规模太阳能部署
2020 – 2021
📈

Listed on Bursa Malaysia

Disenaraikan di Bursa Malaysia

在馆来西亚交易所上市

IPO 2021
Bursa Malaysia ACE Market
RM 44.4 Million Raised
PSOL · 0233
2020Corporate restructuring — Pekat Group Berhad with Engineering, E&LP & Solar divisionsPenstrukturan korporat — Pekat Group Berhad dengan bahagian Kejuruteraan, E&LP & Solar依据关系列公司—Pekat集團有限公司，下设工程、E&LP、太阳能三個部门
2021Successful IPO on Bursa Malaysia ACE Market, raising RM44.4M to fuel growthBerjaya IPO di Pasaran ACE Bursa Malaysia, mengumpul RM44.4 juta untuk memacu pertumbuhan成功在馆来西亚交易所ACE市场上市，质资4440万令推动增长
Today & Beyond
Hari Ini & Seterusnya
当下与未来
⭐

Terus Maju ke Hadapan

硫前拨展

Sales & Operations SOP

SOP Jualan & Operasi

Standard Operating Procedure for all project teams — from project award to close-out.

Prosedur Operasi Standard untuk semua pasukan projek — dari anugerah projek hingga penutupan.

Symbols: rounded terminator = start/end · rectangle = task/handoff (colour-coded by department, top-left bar) · diamond = decision point · solid arrow = primary flow · dashed/curved arrow = conditional or cross-lane handoff. ⚠ Safety workstream (bottom) is not present in the source process-flow PDF — shown here from the existing SOP content for completeness; verify against the standalone Safety SOP.
Simbol: bujur = mula/tamat · segi empat = tugasan/serahan (kod warna mengikut jabatan) · diamond = titik keputusan · anak panah tegas = aliran utama · anak panah putus-putus/lengkung = aliran bersyarat atau serahan rentas baris. ⚠ Aliran kerja Keselamatan (bawah) tidak terdapat dalam PDF aliran proses sumber — dipaparkan di sini daripada kandungan SOP sedia ada untuk kesempurnaan; sahkan dengan SOP Keselamatan berasingan.

RACI Matrix

Matriks RACI

Defines roles and responsibilities across all departments for each key activity.

Menentukan peranan dan tanggungjawab merentasi semua jabatan untuk setiap aktiviti utama.

📊 How to Read the RACI Matrix
R — Responsible
Does the work
A — Accountable
Owns the outcome
C — Consulted
Gives input
I — Informed
Kept updated
Each activity must have exactly one A. R can be shared. C/I are for coordination.
R ResponsibleBertanggungjawab
A AccountableAkauntabel
C ConsultedDirunding
I InformedDimaklumkan
ActivityAktiviti BDPreConD&DPTSCA&LPostCSafety
Create Project + LOACipta Projek + LOA R C C C – – I I
Site Visit / SurveyLawatan Tapak / Tinjauan A R C C – – I C
Electrical & Civil InputInput Elektrik & Sivil I R C I – – – –
CAS/PSS SubmissionPenyerahan CAS/PSS I C R I – A – –
Shop DrawingLukisan Binaan I C R C I I I –
BOM & Quantity CheckBOM & Semakan Kuantiti I – R A C – C –
Material Requisition (MR)Permohonan Bahan (MR) – – I R C – A –
Procurement / POPerolehan / PO – – I C R – A –
Site DeliveryPenghantaran ke Tapak – – – A R – – I
Daily Progress ReportLaporan Kemajuan Harian – – – R – – – C
Subcon Quality / NCRKualiti Subkon / NCR – – – R – – – A
PTW / Safety CompliancePTW / Pematuhan Keselamatan – – – C – – – R
T&C ProcessProses T&C – A C R – C – I
SEDA/TNB/ST ApplicationPermohonan SEDA/TNB/ST C C C C – R – –
Chargeman AppointmentPelantikan Chargeman – C – – – R – –
COD ConfirmationPengesahan COD C C – C – R I –
Subcon PaymentPembayaran Subkon – – – C – – R –
Billing to ClientPengebilan kepada Klien A I – C – C R –
As Built DrawingLukisan Siap Bina I C R A – – I –
Post MortemPost Mortem A C C C C C R –
Actual CostingKos Sebenar C – – C – C R –
MIDA / MGTC SubmissionPenyerahan MIDA / MGTC C – – – – R – –
EKOM / IKOMEKOM / IKOM R C I I – C I –
Variation Order (VO)Perintah Variasi (VO) R C C C C C C –
LHDN / CIDBLHDN / CIDB C – – – – – R –
EAR & WC InsuranceInsurans EAR & WC C – – – – – R –
O&M HandoverPenyerahan O&M C C – R – C I –
Safety BriefingTaklimat Keselamatan – – – C – – – R
Incident ReportingPelaporan Insiden – – – A – – – R

🔶

BD – Business Development

BD – Pembangunan Perniagaan

Project creation, LOA management, EKOM/IKOM, Variation Orders, billing coordination

Penciptaan projek, pengurusan LOA, EKOM/IKOM, Perintah Variasi, koordinasi pengebilan

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
🎯
Enquiry
Done
→
📁
Project
Created
→
🏠
Site
Visit
→
📋
EKOM/IKOM
→
💰
Billing
→
🔄
VO Mgmt
→
📊
Reporting
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
Mark Enquiry as Completed
Tandakan Pertanyaan sebagai Selesai
▼
  • Go to customer enquiry/tender job in the system
  • Change status to Completed before creating the project
  • Pergi ke tugasan pertanyaan/tender pelanggan dalam sistem
  • Tukar status kepada Selesai sebelum mencipta projek
2
Create Project – PSOL Awarded Project
Cipta Projek – PSOL Awarded Project
▼
  • Select the customer in the system
  • Create new project: category = PSOL-Awarded Project
  • Set Project Status: Not Started
  • Pilih pelanggan dalam sistem
  • Cipta projek baru: kategori = PSOL-Awarded Project
  • Tetapkan Status Projek: Belum Bermula
⚠ WARN: Every enquiry must be a NEW project. Do not combine.
⚠ AMARAN: Setiap pertanyaan mesti menjadi projek BARU. Jangan gabungkan.
3
Attach LOA (Letter of Award)
Lampirkan LOA (Surat Anugerah)
▼
  • Attach signed LOA document inside the project
  • Update project comment: LOA attached on [date]
  • Tag relevant team leads
  • Lampirkan dokumen LOA yang ditandatangani dalam projek
  • Kemaskini komen projek: LOA dilampirkan pada [tarikh]
  • Tag ketua pasukan berkaitan
⚠ WARN: Never proceed to site visit without LOA attached.
⚠ AMARAN: Jangan teruskan ke lawatan tapak tanpa LOA dilampirkan.
4
Create Site Visit Job
Cipta Tugasan Lawatan Tapak
▼
  • Create Site Visit Job in system
  • Assign: PreCon, BD, D&D, PT
  • Fill in dates, reminder, description, attachments
  • Attach BD Pre-Site Survey Checklist digital form
  • Cipta Tugasan Lawatan Tapak dalam sistem
  • Tugaskan: PreCon, BD, D&D, PT
  • Isi tarikh, peringatan, penerangan, lampiran
  • Lampirkan borang digital BD Pre-Site Survey Checklist
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: BD Pre-Site Survey ChecklistBD Pre-Site Survey Checklist
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PreCon — to confirm site visit datePreCon — untuk mengesahkan tarikh lawatan tapak
5
Create EKOM Job
Cipta Tugasan EKOM
▼
  • Create EKOM Job
  • Fill in BD-EKOM Checklist digital form
  • Update project comment
  • Set status Completed when done
  • Cipta Tugasan EKOM
  • Isi borang digital BD-EKOM Checklist
  • Kemaskini komen projek
  • Tetapkan status Selesai apabila selesai
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: BD-EKOM ChecklistBD-EKOM Checklist
6
Create IKOM Form
Cipta Borang IKOM
▼
  • Create IKOM Form inside the project
  • Complete Pre-IKOM Checklist
  • Cipta Borang IKOM dalam projek
  • Lengkapkan Senarai Semak Pra-IKOM
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: BD IKOM Form, Pre-IKOM ChecklistBorang IKOM BD, Senarai Semak Pra-IKOM
7
Variation Order (if LOA revised)
Perintah Variasi (jika LOA dipinda)
▼
  • Create VO Job if client revises LOA
  • Alert ALL relevant department PICs
  • Attach updated VO document in project
  • Brief each team on scope changes
  • Cipta Tugasan VO jika klien pinda LOA
  • Alert SEMUA PIC jabatan berkaitan
  • Lampirkan dokumen VO terkini dalam projek
  • Beri taklimat setiap pasukan tentang perubahan skop
⚠ WARN: VO must be attached and all teams briefed BEFORE proceeding.
⚠ AMARAN: VO mesti dilampirkan dan semua pasukan diberi taklimat SEBELUM meneruskan.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Variation Order documentDokumen Perintah Variasi
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: All departments — scope change notificationSemua jabatan — notifikasi perubahan skop
🟢

PreCon – Pre-Commissioning

PreCon – Pra-Pentauliahan

Site survey coordination, electrical/structural reports, T&C endorsement, electrical input

Koordinasi tinjauan tapak, laporan elektrik/struktur, pengesahan T&C, input elektrik

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
📅
Confirm
Site Date
→
🔍
Site
Survey
→
📄
Upload
Reports
→
⚡
Fault Level
→
🤝
PreCon
Handover
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
Confirm Site Survey Date with Client
Sahkan Tarikh Lawatan Tapak dengan Klien
▼
  • Receive Site Visit Job from BD
  • Contact client to confirm date
  • Update status: Site Survey Date Confirmed
  • Inform PT and D&D of confirmed date
  • Terima Tugasan Lawatan Tapak dari BD
  • Hubungi klien untuk sahkan tarikh
  • Kemaskini status: Tarikh Tinjauan Tapak Disahkan
  • Maklumkan PT dan D&D
2
Conduct Site Survey & Upload Reports
Jalankan Tinjauan Tapak & Muat Naik Laporan
▼
  • Attend site with BD, D&D, PT
  • Complete electrical and structural assessment
  • Upload Electrical Report in job comment
  • Upload Structure Report in job comment
  • Confirm Data Logging started and completed
  • Hadiri tapak bersama BD, D&D, PT
  • Laksanakan penilaian elektrik dan struktur
  • Muat naik Laporan Elektrik dalam komen
  • Muat naik Laporan Struktur dalam komen
  • Sahkan Pengelogan Data dimulakan dan selesai
⚠ WARN: Reports must be uploaded before D&D proceeds to CAS/PSS or Shop Drawing.
⚠ AMARAN: Laporan mesti dimuat naik sebelum D&D meneruskan CAS/PSS atau Lukisan Binaan.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Electrical Report, Structure ReportLaporan Elektrik, Laporan Struktur
3
Provide Electrical & Civil Input Checklist
Sediakan Senarai Semak Input Elektrik & Sivil
▼
  • Complete PreCon Electrical and Civil Input Checklist
  • Provide: cable sizing, protection settings, load data, earthing requirements
  • Lengkapkan Senarai Semak Input Elektrik & Sivil
  • Sediakan: saiz kabel, tetapan perlindungan, data beban, keperluan pembumian
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: PreCon Electrical & Civil Input ChecklistSenarai Semak Input Elektrik & Sivil
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: D&D — for shop drawing designD&D — untuk rekabentuk lukisan binaan
4
Review BOM & Shop Drawing (when tagged)
Semak BOM & Lukisan Binaan (apabila di-tag)
▼
  • When tagged by D&D, review Shop Drawing against site conditions
  • Provide feedback in job comment
  • Approve or request revision
  • Apabila di-tag oleh D&D, semak Lukisan Binaan berbanding keadaan tapak
  • Beri maklum balas dalam komen tugasan
  • Luluskan atau minta semakan
5
T&C Report Endorsement
Pengesahan Laporan T&C
▼
  • Receive T&C Process Job from PT
  • Perform/verify T&C on site
  • Endorse the T&C Report
  • Upload endorsed report in job comment
  • Tag D&D for their endorsement
  • Terima Tugasan Proses T&C dari PT
  • Laksanakan/sahkan T&C di tapak
  • Sahkan Laporan T&C
  • Muat naik laporan yang disahkan dalam komen
  • Tag D&D untuk pengesahan mereka
⚠ WARN: PreCon endorsement is mandatory before D&D and A&L can proceed.
⚠ AMARAN: Pengesahan PreCon adalah wajib sebelum D&D dan A&L boleh meneruskan.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: T&C Report (endorsed copy)Laporan T&C (salinan yang disahkan)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: D&D — for their T&C endorsementD&D — untuk pengesahan T&C mereka
🔵

D&D – Design & Drafting

D&D – Rekabentuk & Pelan

CAS/PSS, shop drawings, BOM, quantity check, T&C endorsement, as-built drawings

CAS/PSS, lukisan binaan, BOM, semakan kuantiti, pengesahan T&C, lukisan siap bina

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
📐
Shop
Drawing
→
✅
T&C
Endorse
→
📦
BOM
Prep
→
🔧
Electrical
Design
→
📏
Structural
→
📋
As-Built
→
💾
Archive
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
D&D Site Visit Checklist
Senarai Semak Lawatan Tapak D&D
▼
  • After site visit, create D&D Site Visit Checklist digital form
  • Fill in pre-visit info and site observations
  • Save and generate PDF copy
  • Selepas lawatan tapak, cipta borang digital Senarai Semak Lawatan Tapak D&D
  • Isi maklumat pra-lawatan dan pemerhatian tapak
  • Simpan dan jana salinan PDF
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: D&D Site Visit ChecklistD&D Site Visit Checklist
2
CAS/PSS Info Checklist
Senarai Semak Maklumat CAS/PSS
▼
  • Create CAS/PSS Info Checklist Job
  • Fill all required project and system info
  • Tag A&L Team for submission when done
  • When A&L requests Fault Level Checking, tag BD
  • Cipta Tugasan Senarai Semak CAS/PSS
  • Isi semua maklumat projek dan sistem
  • Tag Pasukan A&L untuk penyerahan apabila selesai
  • Apabila A&L minta Semakan Paras Kesalahan, tag BD
⚠ WARN: Do not tag A&L until checklist is FULLY completed.
⚠ AMARAN: Jangan tag A&L sehingga senarai semak SEPENUHNYA lengkap.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: D&D CAS/PSS Info ChecklistD&D CAS/PSS Info Checklist
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: A&L — for CAS/PSS submission to consultantA&L — untuk penyerahan CAS/PSS kepada perunding
3
Shop Drawing (draft to final)
Lukisan Binaan (draf ke akhir)
▼
  • Create Shop Drawing Job
  • Draughter Manager assigns draughter
  • Draughter uploads draft → Designer reviews (1st & 2nd)
  • Draughter revises per feedback
  • Design Manager & Draughter Manager give final approval
  • Attach FINAL drawing at PROJECT level
  • Cipta Tugasan Lukisan Binaan
  • Pengurus Jurutera Pelukis tugaskan jurutera pelukis
  • Jurutera pelukis muat naik draf → Pereka semak (ke-1 & ke-2)
  • Jurutera pelukis semak semula berdasarkan maklum balas
  • Pengurus Rekabentuk & Pengurus Jurutera Pelukis beri kelulusan akhir
  • Lampirkan lukisan AKHIR di peringkat PROJEK
⚠ WARN: Final drawing MUST be at project level, not just the job.
⚠ AMARAN: Lukisan akhir MESTI di peringkat projek, bukan hanya tugasan.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Shop Drawing (multi-revision)Lukisan Binaan (pelbagai semakan)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — to send final drawing to clientPT — untuk hantar lukisan akhir kepada klien
4
Quantity Check & BOM
Semakan Kuantiti & BOM
▼
  • Quantity Check: Email supplier (CC: SC, PT). Tag SC and PT once info received.
  • BOM: Upload BOM draft, tag Reviewer for feedback, finalise BOM
  • Semakan Kuantiti: E-mel kepada pembekal (CC: SC, PT). Tag SC dan PT setelah maklumat diterima.
  • BOM: Muat naik draf BOM, tag Pengulas untuk maklum balas, siapkan BOM akhir
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: BOM, Supplier Quantity InfoBOM, Maklumat Kuantiti Pembekal
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: SC and PT — quantities confirmedSC dan PT — kuantiti disahkan
5
BOM & Shop Drawing Submission to Client
Penyerahan BOM & Lukisan kepada Klien
▼
  • Create submission job
  • Upload BOM and Shop Drawing
  • Tag: QS (BOM), PT (Shop Drawing), PreCon (drawing), PostC (BOM cost), BD, SC
  • Inform PT to send drawing to client
  • Attach final versions at project level after all approvals
  • Cipta tugasan penyerahan
  • Muat naik BOM dan Lukisan Binaan
  • Tag: QS (BOM), PT (Lukisan), PreCon (Lukisan), PostC (kos BOM), BD, SC
  • Maklumkan PT untuk hantar lukisan kepada klien
  • Lampirkan versi akhir di peringkat projek selepas semua kelulusan
⚠ WARN: All tagged teams must respond before marking Completed.
⚠ AMARAN: Semua pasukan yang di-tag mesti memberi respons sebelum menandakan Selesai.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: BOM (final), Shop Drawing (final)BOM (akhir), Lukisan Binaan (akhir)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — send drawing to clientPT — hantar lukisan kepada klien
6
T&C Report Endorsement
Pengesahan Laporan T&C
▼
  • When tagged by PreCon, review T&C Report
  • Provide endorsement (sign off)
  • Upload endorsed T&C Report in comment
  • Tag PT to confirm and proceed to A&L
  • Apabila di-tag oleh PreCon, semak Laporan T&C
  • Berikan pengesahan (tandatangan)
  • Muat naik Laporan T&C yang disahkan dalam komen
  • Tag PT untuk sahkan dan teruskan ke A&L
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: T&C Report (D&D endorsed)Laporan T&C (disahkan D&D)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — to tag A&L for submissionPT — untuk tag A&L untuk penyerahan
7
As Built Drawing
Lukisan Siap Bina
▼
  • When tagged by PT, Draughter Manager assigns draughter
  • Draughter prepares As Built based on actual installed config
  • Draughter attaches drawing in job comment
  • Draughter Manager reviews
  • Attach FINAL As Built at PROJECT level
  • Apabila di-tag oleh PT, Pengurus Jurutera Pelukis tugaskan jurutera pelukis
  • Jurutera pelukis sediakan Lukisan Siap Bina berdasarkan konfigurasi sebenar
  • Jurutera pelukis lampirkan lukisan dalam komen
  • Pengurus Jurutera Pelukis semak
  • Lampirkan Lukisan Siap Bina AKHIR di peringkat PROJEK
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: As Built DrawingLukisan Siap Bina
🟣

PT – Project Team

PT – Pasukan Projek

Site delivery, MR, daily progress, quality inspection, T&C coordination, project close-out

Penghantaran tapak, MR, kemajuan harian, pemeriksaan kualiti, koordinasi T&C, penutupan projek

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
📋
Job Brief
→
🏗️
Site
Setup
→
⚡
Electrical
Work
→
🔩
Structural
→
🔌
Inverter
→
✅
T&C
→
📄
As-Built
→
🔒
ST
Submit
→
💧
Earthing
→
🏁
Handover
→
📸
Docs
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
PT Site Visit Checklist
Senarai Semak Lawatan Tapak PT
▼
  • Attend site visit (arranged by PreCon)
  • Complete PT Site Visit Checklist on-site
  • Fill: date, time, observations
  • Set status: Site Survey Completed
  • Hadiri lawatan tapak (diatur oleh PreCon)
  • Lengkapkan PT Site Visit Checklist di tapak
  • Isi: tarikh, masa, pemerhatian
  • Tetapkan status: Tinjauan Tapak Selesai
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: PT Site Visit ChecklistPT Site Visit Checklist
2
Dilap Check
Semakan Dilap
▼
  • Create Dilap Check Job
  • Fill PT-Dilap Form digital form
  • Tag Project Manager for signature
  • Set Completed once PM signs
  • Cipta Tugasan Semakan Dilap
  • Isi borang digital PT-Dilap Form
  • Tag Pengurus Projek untuk tandatangan
  • Tetapkan Selesai apabila PM menandatangani
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: PT Dilap FormPT Dilap Form
3
Material Requisition (MR)
Permohonan Bahan (MR)
▼
  • Create MR Job
  • Attach completed MR document
  • PM verifies MR → PM tags PostC and SC
  • PostC approves costing → SC begins procurement
  • Cipta Tugasan MR
  • Lampirkan dokumen MR yang lengkap
  • PM sahkan MR → PM tag PostC dan SC
  • PostC luluskan kos → SC mula perolehan
⚠ WARN: MR must be verified by PM AND approved by PostC before SC issues PO.
⚠ AMARAN: MR mesti disahkan oleh PM DAN diluluskan oleh PostC sebelum SC keluarkan PO.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Material Requisition (MR) documentDokumen Permohonan Bahan (MR)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PostC (cost approval) then SC (procurement)PostC (kelulusan kos) kemudian SC (perolehan)
4
On-Site Delivery Request
Permintaan Penghantaran ke Tapak
▼
  • Create On-Site Delivery Request Job
  • Propose delivery date, attach Job/MR ID
  • Tag SC Team
  • Confirm DO verified by client upon receipt
  • Cipta Tugasan Permintaan Penghantaran
  • Cadangkan tarikh, lampirkan ID Tugasan/MR
  • Tag Pasukan SC
  • Sahkan DO disahkan oleh klien setelah diterima
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: SC — to arrange and confirm deliverySC — untuk atur dan sahkan penghantaran
5
Daily Site Progress Report
Laporan Kemajuan Harian Tapak
▼
  • Create Daily Site Progress Report Job
  • Update daily progress in the Updates section
  • Update status weekly (Week 1, Week 2 ...)
  • Confirm all reports completed before closing
  • Cipta Tugasan Laporan Kemajuan Harian
  • Kemaskini kemajuan harian dalam bahagian Kemas kini
  • Kemaskini status setiap minggu (Minggu 1, Minggu 2 ...)
  • Sahkan semua laporan selesai sebelum tutup
6
Subcon Quality Inspection / NCR
Pemeriksaan Kualiti Subkon / NCR
▼
  • Create Subcon Quality Inspection Job
  • Attach defect list in comment
  • Track defect resolution
  • Close only when all defects resolved
  • Cipta Tugasan Pemeriksaan Kualiti Subkon
  • Lampirkan senarai kecacatan dalam komen
  • Jejak penyelesaian kecacatan
  • Tutup hanya apabila semua kecacatan diselesaikan
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Defect List / NCR FormSenarai Kecacatan / Borang NCR
7
T&C Process
Proses T&C
▼
  • Create T&C Process Job
  • Attach T&C Report
  • Tag PreCon → PreCon endorses → tags D&D → D&D endorses → tag A&L
  • Cipta Tugasan Proses T&C
  • Lampirkan Laporan T&C
  • Tag PreCon → PreCon sahkan → tag D&D → D&D sahkan → tag A&L
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: T&C ReportLaporan T&C
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: A&L — for ST/TNB submissionA&L — untuk penyerahan ST/TNB
8
As Built Drawing
Lukisan Siap Bina
▼
  • Create As Built Drawing Job
  • Tag Draughter Manager
  • Confirm final As Built attached at project level
  • Cipta Tugasan Lukisan Siap Bina
  • Tag Pengurus Jurutera Pelukis
  • Sahkan Lukisan Siap Bina akhir dilampirkan di peringkat projek
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: D&D — to prepare As Built DrawingD&D — untuk sediakan Lukisan Siap Bina
9
Material Return
Pemulangan Bahan
▼
  • Create Material Return Job
  • Propose collection date to SC
  • Fill PT-Material Return Form
  • SC confirms date, receives items, signs form
  • Cipta Tugasan Pemulangan Bahan
  • Cadangkan tarikh pengambilan kepada SC
  • Isi PT-Material Return Form
  • SC sahkan tarikh, terima item, tandatangan borang
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: PT Material Return FormPT Material Return Form
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: SC — to collect returned materialsSC — untuk mengambil bahan yang dipulangkan
10
O&M Process (after COD)
Proses O&M (selepas COD)
▼
  • Create O&M Process Job after COD confirmed by A&L
  • Attach handling checklist
  • Confirm training date
  • Attach COD Form for client signature
  • Cipta Tugasan Proses O&M setelah COD disahkan oleh A&L
  • Lampirkan senarai semak pengendalian
  • Sahkan tarikh latihan
  • Lampirkan Borang COD untuk tandatangan klien
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: O&M Handling Checklist, COD FormSenarai Semak O&M, Borang COD
11
Post Mortem
Post Mortem
▼
  • Create Post Mortem Job
  • Tag QS → QS tags BD → BD tags PT (fill PT challenges) → tag SC → SC tags D&D → D&D tags PreCon → PreCon tags A&L → A&L tags PostC
  • PostC creates Actual Costing once all done
  • Cipta Tugasan Post Mortem
  • Tag QS → QS tag BD → BD tag PT (isi cabaran PT) → tag SC → SC tag D&D → D&D tag PreCon → PreCon tag A&L → A&L tag PostC
  • PostC cipta Kos Sebenar apabila semua selesai
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: SC — for their post mortem inputSC — untuk input post mortem mereka
🟡

SC – Supply Chain

SC – Rantaian Bekalan

Procurement, purchase orders, goods receiving, delivery management, material returns

Perolehan, pesanan belian, penerimaan barang, pengurusan penghantaran, pemulangan bahan

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
📦
MR
Receive
→
🛒
Purchase
Order
→
🚚
Delivery
→
📥
GRN
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
Review Approved MR & Create Procurement Job
Semak MR Diluluskan & Cipta Tugasan Perolehan
▼
  • Receive notification from PT/PostC that MR is approved
  • Create Procurement/PO Job
  • Get management budget approval if required
  • Issue Purchase Orders to suppliers
  • Complete SC PO Submission digital form
  • Update PT on ETA of materials
  • Terima notifikasi MR diluluskan dari PT/PostC
  • Cipta Tugasan Perolehan/PO
  • Dapatkan kelulusan belanjawan pengurusan jika perlu
  • Keluarkan Pesanan Belian kepada pembekal
  • Lengkapkan borang digital SC PO Submission
  • Kemaskini PT mengenai ETA bahan
⚠ WARN: Do not issue PO without approved MR and management budget approval.
⚠ AMARAN: Jangan keluarkan PO tanpa MR diluluskan dan kelulusan belanjawan pengurusan.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: SC PO SubmissionSC PO Submission
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — to acknowledge ETAPT — untuk mengakui ETA
2
Goods Received
Barang Diterima
▼
  • Track delivery with suppliers
  • Complete SC Goods Received Form when items arrive
  • Record partial vs full receipt
  • Update job status: Partially Received → Fully Received
  • Tag PT when goods received
  • Jejak penghantaran dengan pembekal
  • Lengkapkan Borang SC Goods Received apabila item tiba
  • Rekod penerimaan sebahagian berbanding penuh
  • Kemaskini status: Sebahagian Diterima → Sepenuhnya Diterima
  • Tag PT apabila barang diterima
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: SC Goods Received FormSC Goods Received Form
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — to acknowledge receiptPT — untuk mengakui penerimaan
3
On-Site Delivery
Penghantaran ke Tapak
▼
  • Receive delivery request from PT
  • Confirm delivery date
  • Arrange transport and logistics to site
  • Issue Delivery Order (DO) to PT
  • Update actual delivery date in comment
  • Terima permintaan penghantaran dari PT
  • Sahkan tarikh penghantaran
  • Atur pengangkutan dan logistik ke tapak
  • Keluarkan Perintah Penghantaran (DO) kepada PT
  • Kemaskini tarikh penghantaran sebenar dalam komen
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Delivery Order (DO)Perintah Penghantaran (DO)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — to verify DO with clientPT — untuk mengesahkan DO dengan klien
4
Material Return (Collection)
Pemulangan Bahan (Pengambilan)
▼
  • Receive material return notification from PT
  • Agree on collection date
  • Receive returned items at warehouse
  • Fill in remarks on Material Return Form
  • Sign the form
  • Confirm items match original MR quantities
  • Terima notifikasi pemulangan bahan dari PT
  • Persetujui tarikh pengambilan
  • Terima item yang dipulangkan di gudang
  • Isi catatan pada Borang Pemulangan Bahan
  • Tandatangan borang
  • Sahkan item sepadan dengan kuantiti MR asal
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: PT Material Return Form (sign)PT Material Return Form (tandatangan)
🟩

A&L – Application & Licensing

A&L – Permohonan & Lesen

SEDA, TNB, ST, MIDA, MGTC submissions · Chargeman · COD confirmation

Penyerahan SEDA, TNB, ST, MIDA, MGTC · Chargeman · Pengesahan COD

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
📝
NEM/ST
Prep
→
🌐
MySEDA
Submit
→
🔌
CAS/PSS
→
📜
ST Licence
→
📋
Wiring
Cert
→
🔍
Meter
Inspect
→
✅
NEM Live
→
📊
Monitor
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
CAS/PSS Submission to Consultant
Penyerahan CAS/PSS kepada Perunding
▼
  • When tagged by D&D, receive CAS/PSS Info Checklist
  • Submit CAS/PSS to consultant
  • Tag BD for Fault Level Checking input
  • Update comment with CAS Form status
  • Apabila di-tag oleh D&D, terima Senarai Semak CAS/PSS
  • Serahkan CAS/PSS kepada perunding
  • Tag BD untuk input Semakan Paras Kesalahan
  • Kemaskini komen dengan status Borang CAS
2
NEM Path – SEDA NEM Quota Application
Laluan NEM – Permohonan Kuota NEM SEDA
▼
  • Create SEDA NEM Quota Application Job
  • Gather: Shop Drawing, Land Title, TNB Bill (3 months), CAS Approval
  • Tag Manager for approval before submission
  • Cipta Tugasan Permohonan Kuota NEM SEDA
  • Kumpul: Lukisan Binaan, Hakmilik Tanah, Bil TNB (3 bulan), Kelulusan CAS
  • Tag Pengurus untuk kelulusan sebelum penyerahan
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: SEDA NEM Quota Application docsDokumen Permohonan Kuota NEM SEDA
3
SELCO Path – PBT + NOL
Laluan SELCO – PBT + NOL
▼
  • PBT Job: bank guarantee, 5 plan copies, cover letter, site photos, MOS, insurance policy
  • NOL Job: PSS Approval (>425kWac), Borang G&H, SELCO Reg Form, Shop Drawing
  • Tag Manager for approval on each
  • Tugasan PBT: wang cagaran bank, 5 salinan pelan, surat pengesahan, gambar tapak, MOS, polisi insurans
  • Tugasan NOL: Kelulusan PSS (>425kWac), Borang G&H, Borang Pendaftaran SELCO, Lukisan Binaan
  • Tag Pengurus untuk kelulusan bagi setiap tugasan
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: PBT + NOL application documentsDokumen permohonan PBT + NOL
4
Chargeman Appointment
Pelantikan Chargeman
▼
  • Create Chargeman Appointment Job
  • Documents: Akuan Permohonan, Appointment Letter, Chargeman IC, Chargeman ST Certificate
  • Tag Manager for approval
  • Cipta Tugasan Pelantikan Chargeman
  • Dokumen: Akuan Permohonan, Surat Pelantikan, IC Chargeman, Sijil ST Chargeman
  • Tag Pengurus untuk kelulusan
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Chargeman appointment docs (4 items)Dokumen pelantikan Chargeman (4 item)
5
ST NEM / SELCO Application (>72kWac)
Permohonan ST NEM / SELCO (>72kWac)
▼
  • Applicable only for projects >72kWac
  • Create ST NEM or ST SELCO Application Job
  • Complete checklist, gather inputs from departments
  • Tag Manager for approval before filing with ST
  • Hanya untuk projek >72kWac
  • Cipta Tugasan Permohonan ST NEM atau ST SELCO
  • Lengkapkan senarai semak, kumpul input dari jabatan
  • Tag Pengurus untuk kelulusan sebelum memfailkan dengan ST
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: ST NEM / SELCO Application docsDokumen Permohonan ST NEM / SELCO
6
TNB Change Metering (NEM)
Pertukaran Meter TNB (NEM)
▼
  • Create TNB Change Metering Job after T&C completed
  • Prepare all meter change documentation
  • Tag Manager for approval
  • Track TNB inspection and meter change date
  • Cipta Tugasan Pertukaran Meter TNB selepas T&C selesai
  • Sediakan semua dokumentasi pertukaran meter
  • Tag Pengurus untuk kelulusan
  • Jejak pemeriksaan TNB dan tarikh pertukaran meter
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: TNB Change Metering docsDokumen Pertukaran Meter TNB
7
Confirm COD
Sahkan COD
▼
  • Once grid and metering approved and live, confirm COD
  • Update Commercial Operation Date in Project Details
  • Tag PT to start O&M Process Job
  • Notify BD and PostC of COD
  • Setelah grid dan meter diluluskan dan aktif, sahkan COD
  • Kemaskini Tarikh Operasi Komersial dalam Butiran Projek
  • Tag PT untuk mulakan Tugasan Proses O&M
  • Maklumkan BD dan PostC mengenai COD
⚠ WARN: COD date must be accurately recorded — triggers billing, O&M start, and performance guarantees.
⚠ AMARAN: Tarikh COD mesti direkodkan dengan tepat — mencetuskan pengebilan, permulaan O&M, dan jaminan prestasi.
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — to start O&M ProcessPT — untuk mulakan Proses O&M
8
MIDA & GITA MGTC Submissions
Penyerahan MIDA & GITA MGTC
▼
  • Create MIDA Submission Job: complete checklist, tag Manager
  • Create GITA MGTC Submission Job if project qualifies (optional)
  • Update status upon submission acknowledgement
  • Cipta Tugasan Penyerahan MIDA: lengkapkan senarai semak, tag Pengurus
  • Cipta Tugasan Penyerahan GITA MGTC jika projek layak (pilihan)
  • Kemaskini status apabila penyerahan diakui
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: MIDA + GITA MGTC application docsDokumen permohonan MIDA + GITA MGTC
🔴

PostC – Post Contract

PostC – Pasca Kontrak

MR approval, LHDN/CIDB, post costing, subcon payment, billing, actual costing, project close-out

Kelulusan MR, LHDN/CIDB, kos pasca, pembayaran subkon, pengebilan, kos sebenar, penutupan projek

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
💰
Billing
Submit
→
🔄
Progress
Claim
→
📋
VO
Process
→
✅
Defect
Liability
→
📄
Final
Acc
→
🏛️
Retention
→
📊
Revenue
→
🗂️
Close
File
→
📈
Report
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
Approve Material Requisition (MR) Costing
Luluskan Kos Permohonan Bahan (MR)
▼
  • When tagged by PM, review MR costing
  • Verify costs are within approved project budget
  • Provide written approval in job comment
  • Tag SC once approved
  • Apabila di-tag oleh PM, semak kos MR
  • Sahkan kos dalam belanjawan projek yang diluluskan
  • Beri kelulusan bertulis dalam komen tugasan
  • Tag SC apabila diluluskan
⚠ WARN: PostC must approve MR costing before SC issues any PO.
⚠ AMARAN: PostC mesti meluluskan kos MR sebelum SC mengeluarkan PO.
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: SC — to proceed with procurementSC — untuk meneruskan perolehan
2
Client Correspondence (when needed)
Surat-Menyurat Klien (apabila diperlukan)
▼
  • Create Client Correspondence Job when formal correspondence needed
  • Manage: Commercial Correspondence, Performance Guarantees (to/from), Security Deposit, Parental Guarantees, General Correspondence
  • Cipta Tugasan Surat-Menyurat Klien apabila surat-menyurat rasmi diperlukan
  • Uruskan: Surat-Menyurat Komersial, Jaminan Prestasi (kepada/dari), Deposit Keselamatan, Jaminan Ibu Bapa, Surat-Menyurat Umum
3
LHDN Stamping / CIDB Declaration
Setem LHDN / Deklarasi CIDB
▼
  • Create LHDN/CIDB Job
  • Update comment when LHDN Stamping completed
  • Update comment when CIDB Declaration completed
  • Tag BD when fully done
  • Cipta Tugasan LHDN/CIDB
  • Kemaskini komen apabila Setem LHDN selesai
  • Kemaskini komen apabila Deklarasi CIDB selesai
  • Tag BD apabila selesai sepenuhnya
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: LHDN Stamp, CIDB DeclarationSetem LHDN, Deklarasi CIDB
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: BD — notification of completionBD — notifikasi penyiapan
4
EAR & WC Insurance
Insurans EAR & WC
▼
  • Create EAR & WC Job
  • Update comment when insurance obtained and processed
  • Tag BD when complete
  • Cipta Tugasan EAR & WC
  • Kemaskini komen apabila insurans diperoleh dan diproses
  • Tag BD apabila selesai
5
Post Costing
Kos Pasca Projek
▼
  • Create Post Costing Job
  • Fill Post Costing digital form with all figures and attachments
  • Sign 'Prepared by', fill designation
  • Send to Management for approval signatures
  • Update comment when Management approves
  • Generate PDF copy
  • Cipta Tugasan Kos Pasca
  • Isi borang digital Kos Pasca dengan semua angka dan lampiran
  • Tandatangan 'Disediakan oleh', isi jawatan
  • Hantar kepada Pengurusan untuk tandatangan kelulusan
  • Kemaskini komen apabila Pengurusan meluluskan
  • Jana salinan PDF
⚠ WARN: Post Costing requires Management sign-off before it is complete.
⚠ AMARAN: Kos Pasca memerlukan tandatangan Pengurusan sebelum ia selesai.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Post Costing digital form (management-signed)Borang digital Kos Pasca (ditandatangani pengurusan)
6
Subcon Work Order / RFQ
Perintah Kerja Subkon / RFQ
▼
  • If LTSA Subcon available: Create Subcon Work Order → issue Work Order → tag PT
  • If no LTSA/rejected: Change status to 'Proceed with RFQ' → PT creates RFQ Prep → PM approves → PostC issues RFQ
  • Receive quotation → complete Quotation Approval Form → issue Work Order
  • Jika LTSA Subkon ada: Cipta Perintah Kerja Subkon → keluarkan PK → tag PT
  • Jika tiada LTSA/ditolak: Tukar status ke 'Teruskan dengan RFQ' → PT sediakan RFQ → PM luluskan → PostC keluarkan RFQ
  • Terima sebut harga → Borang Kelulusan Sebut Harga → keluarkan Perintah Kerja
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Work Order, RFQ, Quotation Approval FormPerintah Kerja, RFQ, Borang Kelulusan Sebut Harga
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — informed of Work OrderPT — dimaklumkan mengenai Perintah Kerja
7
Subcon Payment
Pembayaran Subkontraktor
▼
  • Create Subcon Payment Job
  • Receive monthly progress claim from subcon
  • Prepare interim payment certificate
  • Receive invoice from subcon
  • Issue final SCPC and SCMGD on project completion
  • Cipta Tugasan Pembayaran Subkon
  • Terima tuntutan kemajuan bulanan dari subkon
  • Sediakan sijil pembayaran interim
  • Terima invois dari subkon
  • Keluarkan SCPC dan SCMGD akhir apabila projek selesai
8
Billing to Client
Pengebilan kepada Klien
▼
  • Create Billing Job when milestone achieved
  • Refer to Project Milestone in project details
  • Inform Finance to issue invoice
  • Update which milestone is claimed
  • Alert BD Team
  • Create sub-job if more milestones remain
  • Cipta Tugasan Pengebilan apabila pencapaian dicapai
  • Rujuk Pencapaian Projek dalam butiran projek
  • Maklumkan Kewangan untuk keluarkan invois
  • Kemaskini pencapaian yang dituntut
  • Alert Pasukan BD
  • Cipta sub-tugasan jika masih ada pencapaian
⚠ WARN: Billing must align exactly with contract milestones.
⚠ AMARAN: Pengebilan mesti sepadan tepat dengan pencapaian kontrak.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Invoice (via Finance)Invois (melalui Kewangan)
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: BD — to follow up with client on paymentBD — untuk susulan dengan klien mengenai pembayaran
9
Actual Costing – Project Close
Kos Sebenar – Penutupan Projek
▼
  • Create Actual Costing Job after Post Mortem completed by all teams
  • Fill Actual Costing digital form with all final cost data
  • Sign 'Prepared by', send to Management for final approval
  • Generate PDF copy
  • PROJECT CLOSED after Management approval
  • Cipta Tugasan Kos Sebenar selepas Post Mortem diselesaikan oleh semua pasukan
  • Isi borang digital Kos Sebenar dengan semua data kos akhir
  • Tandatangan 'Disediakan oleh', hantar kepada Pengurusan untuk kelulusan akhir
  • Jana salinan PDF
  • PROJEK DITUTUP selepas kelulusan Pengurusan
⚠ WARN: Actual Costing is the FINAL closure document. All costs must be accounted for.
⚠ AMARAN: Kos Sebenar adalah dokumen penutupan AKHIR. Semua kos mesti diambil kira.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Actual Costing digital form (management-signed)Borang digital Kos Sebenar (ditandatangani pengurusan)
🟠

Safety – Safety Team

Safety – Pasukan Keselamatan

Site safety, PPE enforcement, permit to work, incident reporting, daily inspections

Keselamatan tapak, penguatkuasaan PPE, permit kerja, pelaporan insiden, pemeriksaan harian

⚡ My Responsibility Flow
📋
Safety
Plan
→
⛑️
Toolbox
Talk
→
🔍
Site
Inspect
→
🚨
Incident
Report
→
✅
Safety
Clear
Click Show My Tasks in Flowchart below to see where you appear in the process.
1
Pre-Construction Safety Briefing
Taklimat Keselamatan Pra-Pembinaan
▼
  • Brief ALL site workers and subcontractors before works commence
  • Cover: PPE, hazards, emergency procedures, permit-to-work
  • Record attendance — all workers must sign
  • Issue site safety rules and emergency contact list
  • Taklimat SEMUA pekerja tapak dan subkontraktor sebelum kerja bermula
  • Liputi: PPE, bahaya, prosedur kecemasan, permit-kerja
  • Rekodkan kehadiran — semua pekerja mesti menandatangani
  • Keluarkan peraturan keselamatan tapak dan senarai kenalan kecemasan
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Safety Briefing Attendance SheetSenarai Kehadiran Taklimat Keselamatan
2
PPE Enforcement
Penguatkuasaan PPE
▼
  • Mandatory: Safety helmet, boots, hi-vis vest, harness (height work), goggles, insulated gloves (electrical)
  • Daily PPE inspection at site entry
  • Workers without PPE NOT permitted on site
  • Document any non-compliance
  • Wajib: Topi keselamatan, but, jaket kelihatan tinggi, harnes (kerja ketinggian), gogel, sarung tangan penebat (elektrik)
  • Pemeriksaan PPE harian di pintu masuk tapak
  • Pekerja tanpa PPE TIDAK dibenarkan masuk tapak
  • Dokumentasikan sebarang ketidakpatuhan
3
Permit to Work (PTW)
Permit Kerja (PTW)
▼
  • PTW MANDATORY for: all electrical work, work at height >1.8m, confined space
  • PTW must be approved by supervisor BEFORE work begins
  • Display PTW at work area during activity
  • Cancel and re-issue if scope or conditions change
  • PTW WAJIB untuk: semua kerja elektrik, kerja di ketinggian >1.8m, ruang tertutup
  • PTW mesti diluluskan oleh penyelia SEBELUM kerja bermula
  • Paparkan PTW di kawasan kerja semasa aktiviti
  • Batalkan dan keluarkan semula jika skop atau keadaan berubah
⚠ WARN: NEVER start electrical or height work without valid PTW. This is a STOP WORK condition.
⚠ AMARAN: JANGAN mulakan kerja elektrik atau ketinggian tanpa PTW yang sah. Ini adalah syarat HENTI KERJA.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Permit to Work FormBorang Permit Kerja
4
Daily Safety Inspection
Pemeriksaan Keselamatan Harian
▼
  • Daily walkthrough before works begin
  • Check: scaffolding, electrical panels, material stacking, housekeeping
  • Record in daily safety log
  • Address unsafe conditions immediately
  • Report critical findings to PT
  • Pemeriksaan tapak harian sebelum kerja bermula
  • Semak: perancah, panel elektrik, susunan bahan, kebersihan
  • Rekod dalam log keselamatan harian
  • Tangani keadaan tidak selamat dengan segera
  • Laporkan penemuan kritikal kepada PT
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Daily Safety Inspection LogLog Pemeriksaan Keselamatan Harian
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT — for awareness and corrective actionPT — untuk makluman dan tindakan pembetulan
5
Incident Reporting
Pelaporan Insiden
▼
  • Any incident MUST be reported immediately
  • Complete Incident Report Form within 24 hours
  • Notify: Safety Officer, PM, Management
  • Investigate root cause, implement corrective action
  • For serious incidents: notify JKKP within 7 days (OSHA 1994)
  • Sebarang insiden MESTI dilaporkan dengan segera
  • Lengkapkan Borang Laporan Insiden dalam 24 jam
  • Maklumkan: Pegawai Keselamatan, PM, Pengurusan
  • Siasat punca asal, laksanakan tindakan pembetulan
  • Untuk insiden serius: maklumkan JKKP dalam 7 hari (OSHA 1994)
⚠ WARN: ALL incidents MUST be reported — including near-misses.
⚠ AMARAN: SEMUA insiden MESTI dilaporkan — termasuk nyaris berlaku.
📋 Form/Document:📋 Borang/Dokumen: Incident Report FormBorang Laporan Insiden
⚡ Hand over to:⚡ Serah kepada: PT and Management — immediate notificationPT dan Pengurusan — notifikasi segera

Bersedia untuk memulakan?

Q 1 / 10

🏆 RankingsKedudukan

A&L FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions

A&L Soalan Lazim

Common questions on Application & Licensing — NEM, TNB grid connection, SEDA, ST licences.

Soalan lazim mengenai Permohonan & Pelesenan — NEM, sambungan grid TNB, SEDA, lesen ST.

📌 A&L Approval Pathway
📝
Application
Prep
→
🌐
MySEDA
Submit
→
🔌
TNB
CAS/PSS
→
🔍
Meter
Inspection
→
✅
NEM
Active

⚡ Net Energy Metering (NEM)⚡ Pengukuran Tenaga Bersih (NEM)

What NEM scheme is currently active in Malaysia?Skim NEM apakah yang aktif di Malaysia sekarang? ▼

Malaysia is on NEM 3.0 (NEM Rakyat). Excess solar energy exported to the grid is credited at the Displaced Cost Rate — not the full retail tariff. Applications are submitted via the MySEDA portal. Open to residential, C&I, and industrial customers on the TNB grid.

Malaysia menggunakan NEM 3.0 (NEM Rakyat). Tenaga solar berlebihan yang dieksport ke grid dikreditkan pada Kadar Kos Tersesar — bukan tarif runcit penuh. Permohonan dikemukakan melalui portal MySEDA. Terbuka kepada pelanggan kediaman, C&I, dan industri di grid TNB.

What documents are needed for a NEM application?Dokumen apa yang diperlukan untuk permohonan NEM? ▼

Required documents: (1) TNB account number & electricity bill, (2) Property ownership doc (geran/strata), (3) System single-line diagram (SLD), (4) Inverter & panel datasheets, (5) ST-licensed contractor declaration, (6) Completed MySEDA NEM form. A&L team prepares and submits the full package.

Dokumen yang diperlukan: (1) Nombor akaun TNB & bil elektrik, (2) Dokumen pemilikan harta (geran/strata), (3) Gambarajah talian tunggal sistem (SLD), (4) Helaian data penyongsang & panel, (5) Pengisytiharan kontraktor berlesen ST, (6) Borang NEM MySEDA lengkap. Pasukan A&L menyediakan dan mengemukakan pakej penuh.

How long does NEM approval take?Berapa lama kelulusan NEM mengambil masa? ▼

SEDA targets 30 days from a complete submission. Incomplete applications, TNB grid constraints, or technical queries can extend this to 60–90 days. A&L must flag to PM if approval is delayed beyond 45 days. Track status via the MySEDA portal dashboard.

SEDA mensasarkan 30 hari dari penyerahan lengkap. Permohonan tidak lengkap, kekangan grid TNB, atau pertanyaan teknikal boleh memanjangkan tempoh ke 60–90 hari. A&L mesti maklumkan PM jika kelulusan lewat melebihi 45 hari. Pantau status melalui papan pemuka portal MySEDA.

🔌 TNB Grid Connection🔌 Sambungan Grid TNB

What is a CAS and when is it required?Apakah CAS dan bilakah ia diperlukan? ▼

CAS (Connection Assessment Study) is a TNB study assessing the impact of your solar system on the local distribution grid. Required for systems above capacity thresholds (typically >72kWp LV or any MV/11kV connection). A&L submits the CAS application with SLD and load details via the TNB portal.

CAS (Kajian Penilaian Sambungan) ialah kajian TNB menilai impak sistem solar anda pada grid pengedaran tempatan. Diperlukan untuk sistem melebihi ambang kapasiti (biasanya >72kWp LV atau sebarang sambungan MV/11kV). A&L mengemukakan permohonan CAS dengan SLD dan butiran beban melalui portal TNB.

What is a PSS and how does it differ from CAS?Apakah PSS dan bagaimana ia berbeza daripada CAS? ▼

PSS (Protection Setting Study) is issued by TNB after CAS is approved. It specifies the protection relay settings the solar system must adopt for safe grid disconnection during faults. D&D must incorporate these PSS settings into the electrical design before installation proceeds.

PSS (Kajian Tetapan Perlindungan) dikeluarkan oleh TNB selepas CAS diluluskan. Ia menyatakan tetapan geganti perlindungan yang mesti diterima pakai sistem solar untuk pemutusan grid selamat semasa gangguan. D&D mesti menggabungkan tetapan PSS ini dalam reka bentuk elektrik sebelum pemasangan diteruskan.

What happens at the TNB metering inspection?Apakah yang berlaku semasa pemeriksaan meter TNB? ▼

After commissioning, TNB conducts a metering inspection to verify the bi-directional meter, confirm protection relay settings, and validate the system configuration before enabling NEM export. A&L coordinates the inspection date with TNB and notifies PT and PostC. All test results must be available on-site for the inspector.

Selepas pentauliahan, TNB menjalankan pemeriksaan meter untuk mengesahkan meter dua arah, mengesahkan tetapan geganti perlindungan, dan mengesahkan konfigurasi sistem sebelum membolehkan eksport NEM. A&L menyelaraskan tarikh pemeriksaan dengan TNB dan memaklumkan PT dan PostC. Semua keputusan ujian mesti tersedia di tapak untuk pemeriksa.

📜 Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) Licences📜 Lesen Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST)

What ST licences does Pekat Solar hold?Apakah lesen ST yang dipegang Pekat Solar? ▼

Pekat Solar holds ST contractor and electrical installation licences authorising solar PV installation works. A&L maintains licence validity, tracks renewal deadlines, and ensures all site works are carried out by or under the supervision of a valid Licensed Person (LP). Verify LP licence before every site start.

Pekat Solar memegang lesen kontraktor dan pemasangan elektrik ST yang membenarkan kerja pemasangan solar PV. A&L mengekalkan kesahan lesen, menjejak tarikh luput pembaharuan, dan memastikan semua kerja tapak dilakukan oleh atau di bawah penyeliaan Orang Berlesen (LP) yang sah. Sahkan lesen LP sebelum setiap permulaan tapak.

What is a Wiring Certificate (WC) and when must it be submitted?Apakah Sijil Pendawaian (WC) dan bilakah ia mesti diserahkan? ▼

A Wiring Certificate (WC) is a statutory declaration by the ST-licensed contractor confirming all electrical works comply with MS IEC standards and are safe for energisation. It must be submitted to TNB before a metering inspection is scheduled. A&L prepares the WC from as-built drawings supplied by D&D and PT post-commissioning.

Sijil Pendawaian (WC) ialah pengisytiharan statutori oleh kontraktor berlesen ST yang mengesahkan semua kerja elektrik mematuhi piawaian MS IEC dan selamat untuk dihidupkan. Ia mesti dikemukakan kepada TNB sebelum pemeriksaan meter dijadualkan. A&L menyediakan WC daripada lukisan as-built yang disediakan oleh D&D dan PT selepas pentauliahan.

🌱 SEDA / Renewable Energy🌱 SEDA / Tenaga Boleh Baharu

What SEDA registration does Pekat Solar need to maintain?Apakah pendaftaran SEDA yang perlu dikekalkan oleh Pekat Solar? ▼

Pekat Solar must maintain its SEDA-approved installer registration to submit NEM applications on behalf of customers. A&L monitors renewal dates, updates the MySEDA installer profile, and ensures all project submissions use the correct installer ID. A lapsed registration blocks all new NEM submissions immediately.

Pekat Solar mesti mengekalkan pendaftaran pemasang yang diluluskan SEDA untuk mengemukakan permohonan NEM bagi pihak pelanggan. A&L memantau tarikh pembaharuan, mengemas kini profil pemasang MySEDA, dan memastikan semua penyerahan projek menggunakan ID pemasang yang betul. Pendaftaran yang tamat tempoh akan menyekat semua penyerahan NEM baharu dengan serta-merta.

What happens if a NEM application is rejected?Apa yang berlaku jika permohonan NEM ditolak? ▼

If rejected: (1) Retrieve the rejection letter and identify the exact reason. (2) Notify PM and BD immediately. (3) Work with D&D to fix technical issues (SLD errors, missing earthing diagram, protection gaps). (4) Resubmit within 14 days. Common reasons: incorrect SLD, expired installer licence, missing earthing diagram, or grid capacity constraint at the local substation.

Jika ditolak: (1) Dapatkan surat penolakan dan kenal pasti sebab tepat. (2) Maklumkan PM dan BD dengan segera. (3) Bekerjasama dengan D&D untuk membetulkan isu teknikal (ralat SLD, gambarajah pembumian tiada, jurang perlindungan). (4) Hantar semula dalam 14 hari. Sebab biasa: SLD salah, lesen pemasang tamat, gambarajah pembumian tiada, atau kekangan kapasiti grid di pencawang tempatan.

🔍
Type at least 2 characters · ↑↓ navigate · Enter open · Esc close
⏱ --:-- | ---
☀️ Together we harness the power of the sun — one project at a time. 🤝 Great teams don’t just work together — they grow together. 📈 Every MWp we install is a step toward a cleaner Malaysia. 💡 Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower. — Steve Jobs 🌿 Sustainability is not a destination — it’s our daily commitment. 🏆 Excellence is not a skill. It is an attitude. — Ralph Marston ⚡ From surge protection to solar power — always ahead of the curve. ⭐ The best way to predict the future is to create it. — Peter Drucker 🤼 Alone we can do so little; together we can do so much. — Helen Keller 🌞 Malaysia’s solar future is being built right here, by this team. 💪 Hard work beats talent when talent doesn’t work hard. — Tim Notke 🚀 Pekat Solar: 25 years of powering progress. Keep pushing forward.
